                        maxPingLostCount?: number;
                        maxRetryCount?: number;
                        pingDelay?: number;
                        pingEnabled?: boolean;
                    };
                };

                    exportContent?: "QUIET_PERIOD"
                    | "POINTER_UP"
                    | "DEMAND";
                    exportContentDelay?: number;
                    resizeTriggerDelay?: number;
                };
                "undo-redo"?: { maxStackSize?: number };
            };

            | "bold" };

                CONVERTER?: LoggerLevel;

                HISTORY?: LoggerLevel;

                    width?: number;
                };
                [key: string]: unknown;
            };
        },
        globalClassCss?: string,
    ): Editor

                      };
                  };

                  };

                  tool?: { enable?: boolean };
              };

                      convert?: { "match-text-size"?: boolean; types?: (...)[] };

                          | undefined

                          | "image/svg+xml"
                      )[];
                      "session-time"?: number;

                          addLKText?: boolean;
                          customLexicon?: (...)[];
                          customResources?: (...)[];
                      };
                  };

                          guides?: boolean;
                          viewport?: { height?: ...; width?: ...; x?: ...; y?: ... };
                      };
                      "image-resolution"?: number;

                          "bounding-box"?: boolean;
                          "full-stroke-ids"?: boolean;
                          ids?: boolean;
                          strokes?: boolean;
                          style?: boolean;
                          text?: { chars?: ...; lines?: ...; words?: ... };
                      };
                      mathml?: { flavor?: { name?: ... } };
                  };
                  gesture?: { enable?: boolean; ignoreGestureStrokes?: boolean };
                  lang?: string;
                  math?: {
                      customGrammar?: string;
                      customGrammarContent?: string;
                      customGrammarId?: string;
                      eraser?: { "erase-precisely"?: boolean };
                      margin?: {
                          bottom?: number;
                          left?: number;
                          right?: number;
                          top?: number;
                      };

                          | undefined
                          | "application/vnd.myscript.jiix"
                          | "application/x-latex"
                          | "application/mathml+xml"
                      )[];

                          "rounding-mode"?: TRoundingMode;
                      };
                      "undo-redo"?: { mode?: TUndoRedoMode };
                  };

                  };

                          addLKText?: boolean;

                          top?: number;

                      pingEnabled?: boolean;
                  };
              };

                  exportContentDelay?: number;
                  resizeTriggerDelay?: number;
              };
